description: Initial screen state: dark background with screen sharing instructions and participant video feed.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text instructions for screen sharing and a small PIP video of the participant.

description: User types the task description: 'It looks like your screen share is working. Here is your task: Imagine you need to book a return domestic flight within Australia...'
frame_description: Text is being typed onto the dark background, detailing the user testing task.

description: An 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen below the task text.
frame_description: The task text is complete, and a circular 'Open' button has appeared in the center.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to start the task.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The screen transitions from the task instructions to the Flight Centre website.

description: The Flight Centre homepage content loads, showing a 'TROPICAL ISLANDS SALE' banner.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is visible with a red header and a large promotional banner.

description: The flight search widget loads and becomes interactive.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The search widget with fields for origin, destination, and dates is now fully visible.

description: User clicks on the 'Where to?' destination input field.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is inside the 'Where to?' input field.

description: A dropdown menu with popular destination suggestions appears.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: A dropdown list of cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane is visible below the destination field.

description: User hovers over 'Sydney, Australia' in the destination dropdown.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the Sydney option in the dropdown list.

description: User selects 'Sydney, Australia' as the destination.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The Sydney option is highlighted as the user clicks to select it.

description: The destination dropdown closes and 'Sydney, Australia' is populated in the field.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The search widget now shows 'Sydney, Australia' in the destination field.

description: User hovers over the date selection field.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the date range field in the search widget.

description: User clicks on the date selection field.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is clicking the date field.

description: The date picker calendar appears.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: A calendar overlay showing February and March 2026 has appeared.

description: User hovers over various dates in the March 2026 calendar within the 'Travel dates' modal.
page_title: Flight Centre - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: A calendar modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing February and March 2026. The cursor is moving over the dates in March.

description: User selects March 17th as the departure date.

frame_description: The cursor clicks on the number 17 in the March calendar.

description: User clicks on March 22, 2026, in the calendar.
page_title: Flight Centre - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The calendar modal shows March 22 highlighted as the selected return date.

description: The calendar UI updates to highlight the selected date range from February 27 to March 22.
frame_description: The calendar modal now shows a blue highlight connecting February 27 and March 22.

description: User hovers over other dates in the March calendar, specifically moving towards March 20.

frame_description: The cursor moves from March 22 towards March 20 in the calendar modal.

description: User hovers over March 20th in the calendar.

frame_description: The cursor lingers over the number 20 in the March calendar.

description: User clicks on March 20, 2026, in the calendar.
page_title: Flight Centre - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The calendar modal updates to show March 20 as the newly selected return date.

description: The calendar UI updates to highlight the new date range from February 27 to March 20.
frame_description: The blue highlight in the calendar now ends on March 20.

description: User selects March 20th as the return date.
page_title: Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the number 20 in the March calendar.

frame_description: The cursor is positioned over March 22 in the calendar modal.

description: User clicks on March 22, 2026, in the calendar.

frame_description: The calendar modal highlights March 22 as the selected return date once more.

description: The calendar UI updates to highlight the date range from February 27 to March 22.
frame_description: The blue highlight in the calendar modal extends to March 22.

description: User hovers over the 'Close' button in the date picker modal.

description: User clicks the 'Close' button.

frame_description: The calendar modal begins to close.

description: The 'Travel dates' modal closes, revealing the flight search form on the homepage.

description: User hovers over the 'Search flights' button.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button.
page_title: Flight Centre - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The page begins to transition as the search is initiated.

description: The page navigates from the homepage to the flight search results page.
page_title: Flight Centre - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The screen shows a loading state as the search results are being fetched.

description: A loading overlay appears with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a progress spinner.
frame_description: A white modal with a blue circular progress indicator and text about fetching deals is displayed.

description: User scrolls down the 'Select Departing Flight' results page.
frame_description: The flight results page is visible, and the content is moving upwards as the user scrolls.

description: User hovers over the first flight result (Jetstar, 6:05am).
frame_description: The cursor is over the top flight result card.

description: User hovers over the second flight result (Virgin Australia, 6:10am).
frame_description: The cursor is over the second flight result card.

description: User hovers over the third flight result (Virgin Australia, 6:15am).
frame_description: The cursor is over the third flight result card.

description: User hovers over the 'From $127' button for the 6:10am Virgin Australia flight.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue price button on the second flight card.

description: User clicks the 'From $127' button.
frame_description: The flight card begins to expand downwards.

description: The UI expands to show 'Select Departing Fare Type' with three fare options.
frame_description: Three columns showing different Virgin Australia fare types (Lite, Choice, Flex) appear below the flight summary.

description: User hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the 'Flex' fare ($219).
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'SELECT' button in the rightmost fare column.

description: User hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare ($127).
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'SELECT' button in the leftmost fare column.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare.
frame_description: The selection is confirmed, and a message appears.

description: A 'Good choice!' overlay appears with the text 'It's time to choose your flight for your return journey.'
frame_description: A green checkmark and 'Good choice!' message are displayed in a central overlay.

description: A loading spinner is displayed while return flights are being loaded.
frame_description: A blue circular progress indicator is shown in the center of the screen.

description: User scrolls down the return flight results page.
frame_description: The return flight results are visible, and the user is scrolling through them.

description: User hovers over the first return flight result (Jetstar, 8:45am).

description: User hovers over the second return flight result (Virgin Australia, 9:10am).
frame_description: The cursor is over the second return flight result card.

description: User hovers over the third return flight result (Virgin Australia, 10:00am).

description: User scrolls further down the return flight results.
frame_description: The content of the return flight results page moves upwards as the user scrolls.

description: User scrolls down through the list of available return flights.

frame_description: A list of flight results from various airlines like Jetstar and Virgin Australia is visible.

description: User hovers over the return flight result for the 12:10pm Virgin Australia flight.

description: User scrolls back up the return flight results page.

description: User hovers over the price button for a Virgin Australia flight departing at 12:10pm.

description: User clicks on the '$177' price button for the Virgin Australia flight.
page_title: Flight Centre
frame_description: The flight row expands slightly as the click occurs.

description: The 'Select Returning Fare Type' section expands below the selected flight, showing Lite, Choice, and Flex options.
frame_description: A new UI panel with three fare columns (Lite, Choice, Flex) appears within the flight results list.

description: User hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare type.

frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'SELECT' button in the 'Lite' fare column.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare.

frame_description: The button is activated.

description: The 'SELECT' button changes to a green 'SELECTED' state with a checkmark.
frame_description: The button now displays 'SELECTED' in green.

description: An 'All Set!' overlay with a loading spinner appears over the page.
frame_description: The screen is dimmed with a white overlay saying 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' and a spinner.

description: The page content updates to show the 'Review trip' summary.
page_title: Flight Centre
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is displayed, showing departing and returning flight details.

description: User scrolls down the 'Review trip' page, passing through flight details, price summary, and add-on sections.

frame_description: The user scrolls past sections for Baggage, Seats, and the Online Captain's Pack.

description: User clicks the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the review page.

description: A 'Thanks for confirming your flights' overlay with a loading spinner appears.

description: The page navigates to the 'Travellers' details entry page.

frame_description: The URL in the address bar changes and the page begins to load new content.

description: Skeleton screens are displayed while the 'Travellers' form content loads.

description: The 'Travellers' form fields (Title, First name, Last name, Date of birth) become visible.

description: A testing tool overlay appears asking 'What's making you hesitate there'.
frame_description: A dark overlay with a text prompt and an 'Open' button appears over the website.

description: User types: 'Thank you for working through that. Shall we move on to the next part?' into the prompt.
frame_description: Text appears in the prompt box as the user types.
